author: a
text:
when the menu bra disappears 
the slogan should animate when scrolling down happens (animates in shifting position to the center of the menu bar, as if all elements in the menu bar retract and go inside it to hide. the rest of the scrolling journey the slogan text only will remain throughut all sections of the homepage,, when the user scrolls up, menu pops when only the slogan is clicked, the slogan must have an indicator of the menu being hidden and it can only be shown again until its clicked or the scrolling reaches the top.
